blocks.deliverable_shape: Small Express endpoint plus node:test coverage in the source-code-endpoint fixture.
blocks.desired_outcome: POST /api/widgets accepts valid JSON input, creates an in-memory widget, and returns 201 with the widget payload.
done_when: Hard gates for endpoint contract and input validation pass.
Summarized evidence references the fixture implementation and tests.
Any partial criterion is captured as a retune instruction.
blocks.purpose: Demonstrate Rubricodex v0.1 on a bounded source-code endpoint task.
working_rules: Use the fixture's existing Node.js runtime.
Store only summarized evidence, not raw command output.
